prophecies.a:
太极未判昏已过，风后女娲石上坐。三皇五帝已相承，承宗流源应不错。而今天下一统周，礼乐文章八百秋。

白话文翻译：天地未分之前的混沌已经过去，风后和女娲端坐石上开天辟地。三皇五帝依次相承，传承的脉络应当不错。如今天下统一于周朝，礼乐文章繁盛了八百年。
prophecies.a_en:
Before the Great Ultimate divided, chaos had already passed; Feng Hou and Nüwa sat upon the stone. The Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors succeeded one another, and the lineage of succession should be correct. Now all under heaven is unified under Zhou, with rites, music, and literature flourishing for eight hundred autumns.

Vernacular: Before heaven and earth were separated, primordial chaos had passed. Feng Hou and Nüwa sat on the stone to create the world. The Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors succeeded each other in proper order. Now the world is unified under the Zhou dynasty, its ritual culture flourishing for eight hundred years.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 周朝（约前1046-前256年）国祚约790年，与「八百秋」之说基本吻合。西周东周合计确为中国历史上最长的朝代。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Zhou dynasty (c. 1046-256 BC) lasted approximately 790 years, closely matching the claim of 'eight hundred autumns.' Combined Western and Eastern Zhou form the longest dynasty in Chinese history.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.q: 第二段：春秋战国与秦统一
prophecies.a:
串去中直传天下，却是春禾换日头。天下由来不固久，二十年间不能守。卯坐金头带直刀，削尽天下木羊首。

白话文翻译：去掉「串」字中间的一竖传得天下，那便是春秋之后改朝换代。天下本来就不能长久稳固，二十年间便守不住了。「卯」坐于金头之上带着直刀，便是「刘」字，削尽天下的阻碍。而「木羊首」暗指秦始皇嬴政，秦朝统一后仅二世而亡。
prophecies.q_en: Segment 2: Spring and Autumn, Warring States, and Qin Unification
prophecies.a_en:
Remove the vertical stroke from 'chuan' to pass the realm — spring grain replaces the sun. All under heaven was never meant to last forever; within twenty years it cannot hold. 'Mao' sits on a golden head with a straight blade — cutting down all the wooden ram heads.

Vernacular: The character puzzle reveals dynastic transition from the Spring and Autumn period onward. The world cannot remain stable forever; within twenty years the dynasty falls. The character components hint at 'Liu,' who will cut down all obstacles. 'Wooden ram head' alludes to the Qin dynasty, which after unification lasted only two generations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 秦始皇于前221年统一六国，建立秦朝，但秦仅历二世（前221-前206年），历时约15年即亡，与「二十年间不能守」相近。「卯坐金头带直刀」拆字为「刘」，暗指刘邦取代秦朝建立汉朝。
prophecies.verdict_en: Qin Shi Huang unified the six states in 221 BC, but the Qin dynasty lasted only two generations (221-206 BC), approximately 15 years — close to the 'twenty years' prediction. The character puzzle components form 'Liu,' alluding to Liu Bang who replaced Qin and founded the Han dynasty.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一土临朝更不祥，改年换国篡平床。泉中涌出光华主，兴复江山又久长。四百年来更世界，日上一曲怀中抱。

白话文翻译：一个「土」字临朝更为不祥，他改年号换国号篡夺了皇位。泉水中涌出光华的主人，兴复了大汉江山又延续了很久。四百年来世界更迭变化，「日上一曲」合为「曹」字，暗指曹操怀中抱持天下。
prophecies.a_en:
One 'earth' character ascends to court — more inauspicious still; he changes the reign name, usurps the state, and seizes the throne. From the spring emerges a radiant lord, who restores the rivers and mountains for a long time yet. Four hundred years pass and the world changes; 'sun above a bent stroke' — embraced in arms.

Vernacular: The character 'earth' at court is ominous — he changes reign titles and usurps the throne (Wang Mang). From 'the spring' emerges a radiant ruler (Liu Xiu, whose name contains 'xiu/light'), restoring the Han. After four hundred years of Han rule, the character puzzle forms 'Cao,' alluding to Cao Cao holding power.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「一土临朝」指王莽（「莽」字含「大」与「犬」，古文拆字法暗指），他于公元9年篡汉建立新朝。「泉中涌出光华主」指刘秀（光武帝），于25年兴复汉室。两汉合计约405年（前206-220年），与「四百年来」吻合。「日上一曲」为「曹」字，指曹操挟天子以令诸侯。
prophecies.verdict_en: 'One earth at court' refers to Wang Mang, who usurped the Han throne in 9 AD and established the Xin dynasty. 'From the spring emerges a radiant lord' refers to Liu Xiu (Emperor Guangwu), who restored the Han in 25 AD. The two Han dynasties combined lasted approximately 405 years (206 BC - 220 AD), matching 'four hundred years.' 'Sun above a bent stroke' forms the character 'Cao,' referring to Cao Cao's domination.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一枝流落去西川，三分社稷传两代。四十年来又一变，相传马上同无半。

白话文翻译：一支势力流落到西川之地，天下三分的社稷传了两代。四十年后又发生了一次大变，相传「马上」同「无半」合为「骑」「司」二字，暗指司马氏。
prophecies.q_en: Segment 4: Three Kingdoms and Western Jin
prophecies.a_en:
One branch drifts away to western Sichuan; the realm split in three passes through two generations. After forty years comes another great change; 'horse above' and 'nothing halved' — so it is said.

Vernacular: One branch (the Shu Han under Liu Bei) retreats to Sichuan, and the tripartite realm lasts two generations. After about forty years another transformation occurs; the character puzzle alludes to the Sima family who unified China as the Jin dynasty.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 刘备于221年在成都称帝，建立蜀汉（西川），与魏、吴三分天下。蜀汉传二帝（刘备、刘禅），于263年亡国。三国时期约60年（220-280年）。「马上同无半」暗指司马氏，司马炎于265年建立西晋，280年统一天下。
prophecies.verdict_en: Liu Bei proclaimed himself emperor in Chengdu in 221 AD, founding Shu Han (western Sichuan), forming a three-way split with Wei and Wu. Shu Han lasted two rulers (Liu Bei, Liu Shan) and fell in 263. The Three Kingdoms period lasted about 60 years (220-280). The character puzzle alludes to the Sima family; Sima Yan founded Western Jin in 265 and unified China in 280.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
两人相和好不当，让来让去有天光。五百年中棍如束，一轮圆光照太清。

白话文翻译：两人互相谦让但结果不好，让来让去之间天光渐现。五百年间纷争如棍捆在一起般纷乱，最终一轮圆月般的光辉照耀太清之天。
prophecies.q_en: Segment 5: Eastern Jin and Northern & Southern Dynasties
prophecies.a_en:
Two people defer to each other but poorly; yielding back and forth until dawn breaks. For five hundred years, staves are bundled together; one round light illuminates the great clarity.

Vernacular: Two figures yield to each other but the outcome is unfortunate, and through mutual yielding daylight gradually appears. For five hundred years conflicts are tangled like a bundle of sticks, until finally a round radiant light illuminates the heavens.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 西晋灭亡后，司马氏南渡建立东晋（317年），此后南北朝长期分裂对峙。从西晋末年（316年）到隋统一（589年），约270余年战乱纷争。诗中「五百年」或为夸张，也有说法从三国算起约涵盖更长时段。「一轮圆光」暗指隋朝统一天下。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the fall of Western Jin, the Sima clan retreated south to establish Eastern Jin (317 AD), followed by the prolonged North-South division. From late Western Jin (316) to Sui reunification (589), over 270 years of conflict ensued. The 'five hundred years' may be hyperbolic or may count from earlier periods. 'One round light' alludes to the Sui dynasty's reunification.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
天上一牛下扶桑，万里山河都是杨。大作胡人千里草，也待戎马入咸阳。

白话文翻译：天上的牛星照耀扶桑之地，万里山河都姓了杨。但大兴的胡人（「千里草」合为「董」字），也等待着戎马兵临咸阳。
prophecies.a_en:
A heavenly ox descends to Fusang; ten thousand li of mountains and rivers all belong to Yang. The great barbarian of 'thousand-mile grass' also awaits war horses entering Xianyang.

Vernacular: The heavenly ox star shines over the land of Fusang; all the realm's mountains and rivers bear the surname Yang (the Sui imperial family). But the great barbarian — 'thousand-mile grass' forming the character 'Dong' — also awaits cavalry marching on the capital.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 杨坚于581年建立隋朝，统一天下，万里山河尽归杨姓。隋炀帝杨广暴政导致天下大乱，李渊于617年起兵攻入长安（古称咸阳附近），隋朝二世而亡（581-618年），仅37年。
prophecies.verdict_en: Yang Jian founded the Sui dynasty in 581 and unified China — all the realm belonged to the Yang surname. Emperor Yang of Sui's tyranny led to widespread rebellion; Li Yuan raised troops and captured Chang'an (near ancient Xianyang) in 617. The Sui lasted only two generations (581-618), just 37 years.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一兀为头字义深，猴边去了配金邻。两朝天子并为一，末限何愁不太平。

白话文翻译：一个「兀」字为头含义深远，「猴」字去掉偏旁再配上金字旁。两朝天子合并为一，到了末期何愁不太平。「兀」加一横为「元」暗指非也，此处「一兀」实为「李」字之隐，指李唐。
prophecies.a_en:
One 'wu' as the head — the meaning is deep; remove the side of 'monkey' and pair it with golden neighbor. Two dynasties' emperors merge into one; at the final limit, why worry about no peace?

Vernacular: The character 'wu' at the top carries deep meaning; remove the radical from 'monkey' and add a metal radical. The emperors of two dynasties merge into one; at the end, there is no need to worry — peace will come. The character puzzles allude to the Li-Tang dynasty.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 李渊于618年建立唐朝，传至唐末907年，国祚289年，为中国最辉煌的朝代之一。「两朝天子并为一」或指武则天改唐为周后又复辟为唐，两朝实为一脉。
prophecies.verdict_en: Li Yuan founded the Tang dynasty in 618, which lasted until 907 — a span of 289 years and one of China's most glorious eras. 'Two dynasties merge into one' may refer to Wu Zetian's brief Zhou dynasty interlude before the Tang was restored, making two dynasties effectively one lineage.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一个孤儿一座城，干戈未定欲何争。一六儿身一六杀，留下胡人二百春。

白话文翻译：一个孤儿守着一座城池，战乱纷争尚未平定。一六即十六，暗指十六国纷争互相残杀。留下胡人统治了二百年春秋。此段也有解读为五代十国时期的混乱局面。
prophecies.q_en: Segment 8: Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms
prophecies.a_en:
One orphan in one city; swords and spears unresolved — what is there to contend? One-six bodies, one-six killed; the barbarians are left two hundred springs.

Vernacular: An orphan guards a single city amid unresolved warfare. 'One-six' (sixteen) alludes to the Sixteen Kingdoms or the chaotic fragmentation. The barbarians remain for two hundred years of spring. This segment is also interpreted as describing the Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms chaos.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 五代十国（907-960年）是唐朝灭亡后的大分裂时期，五个短命朝代和十余个割据政权并存，战乱频仍。此段描绘的纷争与孤城意象与这一时期吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms (907-960) was a period of fragmentation after the Tang dynasty's fall, with five short-lived dynasties and over ten regional regimes coexisting amid constant warfare. The imagery of conflict and isolated cities matches this period.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
客来西北问中原，中原无主待英贤。一个行人一段歌，日头仍在月光多。天下由来我杀人，猪羊鸡犬九家空。

白话文翻译：从西北来的客人询问中原局势，中原没有主人等待着英明贤能之人。一个行人唱着一段歌，太阳虽然还在但月光更多。天下从来就是由我来定夺杀伐，猪羊鸡犬九家皆空。暗指赵匡胤陈桥兵变建立北宋。
prophecies.a_en:
A traveler from the northwest asks about the Central Plain; the Central Plain has no master and awaits a worthy hero. One traveler sings one song; the sun still shines but moonlight grows. All under heaven — from the start, I am the one who determines life and death; pig, sheep, chicken, dog — nine houses empty.

Vernacular: A traveler from the northwest inquires about the Central Plain's situation — it has no ruler and awaits a capable leader. This alludes to Zhao Kuangyin, who through the Chen Bridge mutiny founded the Northern Song dynasty.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 赵匡胤原为后周殿前都点检，960年在陈桥驿发动兵变，黄袍加身，建立北宋。北宋定都开封，统一了大部分中原地区。
prophecies.verdict_en: Zhao Kuangyin was originally the commander of the palace guards of Later Zhou. In 960, he staged a mutiny at Chen Bridge, had the yellow robe draped over him, and founded the Northern Song dynasty, establishing its capital at Kaifeng and unifying most of the Central Plain.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
火猪运到利难堪，三兔一鼠不成安。一汪深水流全国，天下英雄尽倒悬。

白话文翻译：火猪之年运势到来苦难堪忍，三兔一鼠之年不得安宁。一汪深水流遍全国，天下英雄尽皆身陷倒悬之苦。「一汪深水」暗指南宋偏安江南水乡，也暗含亡国之象。
prophecies.a_en:
The fire pig's fate arrives — hardship unbearable; three rabbits and one rat bring no peace. One pool of deep water flows across the whole land; all heroes under heaven hang upside down.

Vernacular: When the year of the fire pig arrives, suffering becomes unbearable. The years of three rabbits and one rat bring no peace. A pool of deep water covers the nation — all heroes suffer the agony of hanging upside down. 'Deep water' alludes to the Southern Song's retreat to the watery south, and portends its eventual fall.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 靖康之变（1127年），金兵攻破开封，北宋灭亡。赵构南渡建立南宋，偏安临安（杭州）。「一汪深水流全国」暗指南宋依托江南水网偏安，也预示最终1279年崖山之战南宋彻底灭亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Jingkang Incident (1127) saw Jurchen forces capture Kaifeng, ending the Northern Song. Zhao Gou fled south and established the Southern Song at Lin'an (Hangzhou). 'Deep water flows across the land' alludes to the Southern Song's reliance on the Yangtze water network, and foreshadows its final destruction at the Battle of Yamen in 1279.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
干戈四起干坤改，草头人出不为真。一雷惊天满地红，世上英雄尽屈从。

白话文翻译：战火四起天地改换，草字头的人出现但并非正统。一声惊雷响彻天际大地一片赤红，世上英雄全都屈服顺从。「草头人」暗指蒙古人，元朝入主中原。
prophecies.a_en:
War erupts on all sides, heaven and earth are transformed; the 'grass-headed' man appears but is not the true ruler. One thunderclap startles the sky, the earth turns red; all heroes under heaven submit in defeat.

Vernacular: War erupts everywhere and the cosmic order is overturned. The 'grass-headed man' (alluding to the Mongols) appears but is not of the legitimate Chinese lineage. A great thunderclap stuns the heavens and the land turns red with blood; all heroes under heaven are forced to submit.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 忽必烈于1271年建立元朝，1279年灭南宋，蒙古人入主中原。元朝疆域空前广大，但蒙古统治者被视为外族。「一雷惊天」形容蒙古铁骑横扫天下的震撼。
prophecies.verdict_en: Kublai Khan established the Yuan dynasty in 1271 and destroyed the Southern Song by 1279, bringing Mongol rule to China. The Yuan had an unprecedentedly vast territory, but the Mongol rulers were seen as foreign. 'One thunderclap startles the sky' describes the devastating impact of the Mongol cavalry sweeping across the land.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一红头人出西方，手执金刀大杀场。明明日月光天德，短法长城筑几航。一枝流落西山下，明月落地人安乐。

白话文翻译：一位红头之人从西方而来，手持金刀大开杀戒。日月光明照耀天德，虽修长城但能维持几何。一支势力流落在西山之下，明月落地之后人们才安居乐业。「日月」合为「明」字，指明朝。
prophecies.a_en:
A red-headed man emerges from the west, holding a golden blade in a great slaughter. Bright sun and moon shine with heavenly virtue; the short wall, the long wall — how many voyages? One branch falls below the western mountain; when the bright moon falls to earth, the people find peace.

Vernacular: A red-headed figure comes from the west wielding a golden blade in great battle. 'Sun and moon' combine to form the character 'Ming,' signifying the Ming dynasty shining with heavenly virtue. Though the Great Wall is built and rebuilt, how long can it hold? A branch falls below the western mountain; when the bright moon (Ming) falls, people finally find peace.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 朱元璋于1368年建立明朝，「日月」合为「明」字。朱元璋起于西方（安徽凤阳），以红巾军起家。明朝历276年（1368-1644年），修筑万里长城防御北方。「明月落地」指明朝灭亡后的安定。
prophecies.verdict_en: Zhu Yuanzhang founded the Ming dynasty in 1368 — 'sun and moon' combine to form the character 'Ming.' He rose from the west (Fengyang, Anhui) through the Red Turban rebellion. The Ming lasted 276 years (1368-1644) and rebuilt the Great Wall. 'Bright moon falls to earth' refers to stability after the Ming's fall.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
一轮红日东方涌，天下英雄尽驰骋。手持金戈挥四方，纵横天下无人挡。

白话文翻译：一轮红日从东方升起，天下英雄纷纷驰骋疆场。手持金色的长戈挥向四方，纵横天下无人能挡。暗指清朝从东北（东方）入关统一天下。
prophecies.a_en:
A round red sun surges from the east; heroes under heaven all gallop forth. Holding a golden halberd, sweeping in all directions; dominating the realm, none can stand in the way.

Vernacular: A round red sun rises from the east; heroes everywhere gallop across the battlefield. Wielding a golden halberd sweeping in all four directions, dominating the realm with none able to resist. This alludes to the Qing dynasty entering through the passes from the northeast (the east) to unify China.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1644年，清军入关，从东北方向（东方）入主中原。清朝前期经康熙、雍正、乾隆三代盛世，疆域辽阔，国力强盛，「纵横天下无人挡」符合这一时期清朝的军事优势。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1644, Qing forces entered through the passes from the northeast. The early Qing experienced the prosperous reigns of Kangxi, Yongzheng, and Qianlong, with vast territory and strong national power. 'Dominating the realm, none can resist' matches the Qing's military supremacy during this period.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.q: 第十四段：清朝灭亡与民国
prophecies.a:
天生一朵大红花，四面八方都放下。万年歌中说天下，寒来暑往不知年。

白话文翻译：天上生出一朵大红花，四面八方都平定安定。万年歌中讲述天下大势，寒暑交替不知过了多少年。「大红花」有说暗指辛亥革命后中华民国的五色旗或后来的红色革命。
prophecies.q_en: Segment 14: Fall of Qing and Republic
prophecies.a_en:
Heaven gives birth to a great red flower; in all directions, everything is laid down. In the Song of Ten Thousand Years, the realm is told; cold and heat alternate — the years are uncounted.

Vernacular: A great red flower blooms from heaven; in all four directions and eight sides, everything settles. The Song of Ten Thousand Years tells the fate of the realm; through alternating cold and heat, countless years pass. The 'great red flower' is interpreted as alluding to the revolution and the red revolutionary movements after the fall of the Qing.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 清朝于1912年灭亡，中华民国成立。「大红花」有多种解读：一说指辛亥革命（红色革命），一说指后来的中华人民共和国（红色政权）。此段预言较为模糊，具体指向存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Qing dynasty fell in 1912 and the Republic of China was established. 'Great red flower' has multiple interpretations: some say it refers to the Xinhai Revolution (a red revolution), others to the later People's Republic of China (a red regime). This segment is relatively vague and its specific reference remains debated.
prophecies.yearReason: 万年歌中根据历史周期推算对应该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Calculated to correspond to this period based on historical cycles in Wanniange

prophecies.a:
天下同归一统休，乾坤万年长如旧。

白话文翻译：天下最终同归一统而安息，乾坤万年如旧长久延续。这是全诗的结尾，预言最终天下将归于统一与太平。
prophecies.a_en:
All under heaven returns to one unified rest; heaven and earth endure ten thousand years as before.

Vernacular: The world ultimately returns to unity and peace; heaven and earth endure for ten thousand years, unchanged as always. This is the poem's conclusion, prophesying that the world will eventually achieve unification and lasting peace.
